subcodes.first_line: O thou who art captive in the path of God! Give thanks to the Ever-Living, the All-Powerful, that in this Most Great Dispensation thou art a believer in the manifest Light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اسیر سبیل الهی شکر کن حضرت حی قدیر را که در این کور عظیم مومن بنور مبین
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom
